name: cfls-coordination
description: Talks only to the local CoordinationAgent: shows a metadata-only team status panel, presence, locks, declared intents, and warnings.

commands.title: CFLS: Reconnect to Local Coordination Agent
CFLS: Set Up This Workspace (Demo Pairing)

cfls.localApi.url.description: Loopback WebSocket URL of the local CoordinationAgent Local_API.

cfls.clientPath.description: Optional absolute path to the installed CFLS client. Leave blank to use the standard installer location.

cfls.localApi.token.description: Per-session Local_Auth_Token presented to the local CoordinationAgent Local_API.

cfls.heartbeat.intervalMs.description: Interval, in milliseconds, at which the extension sends heartbeats to the local CoordinationAgent.
